title: Calderon et al. (2014) Ungka–Iloilo corridor transit-model values (JICA STRADA 3)
provenance: SOURCED — Calderon J.L., Grio M.E.D.A., Delatina R.D., Dela Cruz S.R.G., Lacson R.M.D. (2014), 'Introduction of Bus and BRT Systems along a Major Road Corridor in Iloilo City, Philippines', Proceedings of the 22nd Annual Conference of the Transportation Science Society of the Philippines (TSSP), Iloilo City, 12 Sept 2014. Local copy: data/raw/literature/Calderon2014_Iloilo_BRT.pdf (INVENTORY id LIT-CALDERON, status ✅). Values transcribed 2026-06-10 from the §4.3 transit-model figure captions ('Maximum Volume', Figures 7–18); JICA STRADA 3 models calibrated to 2014 field volume counts and onboard surveys (23 jeepney routes).
unit: pax (peak-hour maximum segment volume, as published)

notes: scenario1_current is the paper's calibrated current (jeepney-only) system — the back-test target for the MATRIX baseline (default for VAL-01). scenario2_bus / scenario3_brt are the paper's proposed bus and BRT systems, usable once MATRIX models a matching intervention scenario. The paper publishes these as figure-caption maxima, not full link tables; n=4 points per scenario is the densest ground truth the source provides.
